sizing_rule.note: Position size determined by optimal f formula: f = (G × Biggest Loss) / -1, where G = geometric mean - 1. Optimal f maximizes geometric mean return and must be calculated from historical trade sequence. Any deviation from optimal f produces suboptimal results.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by the optimal f fraction, which maximizes geometric mean return; betting at any fraction other than optimal f will produce inferior results.
